blockers.description: Next.js server returning 500 Internal Server Error on all routes. Server logs show Google Sheets API authentication failure (invalid_grant). The GOOGLE_PRIVATE_KEY in .env.local appears to be invalid or expired.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried server start after rebuilding, verified port 3000 is accessible. Issue is Google Sheets API credentials - requires credential refresh/replacement.

summary: All 4 assertions BLOCKED due to 500 Internal Server Error on all routes. Root cause: Google Sheets API authentication failure (invalid_grant). Navigation header cannot be tested as pages fail to render.
